title: Add NPCs that walk around the map
Fix truck clipping through buildings and walls
description: The delivery truck can clip through building meshes and the boundary stone walls. Add proper collision detection so the truck is blocked by buildings and walls the same way the player is.

title: Place a box in front of house after delivery
description: After the player completes a delivery to a house, spawn/display a box prop in front of that house to indicate the delivery was made.

title: Add 4 NPC cars that drive on roads and avoid NPCs
description: Spawn 4 NPC-driven cars that patrol/drive along the road network. Cars must: stay on roads, not collide with pedestrian NPCs, and have basic avoidance so they don't pile up.

title: Slow down truck speed slightly
description: Reduce the truck's top speed by a small amount - not too much, just a subtle reduction to make it feel a bit more controlled.

title: Fix roads clipping into boundary walls
description: The road segments near the map perimeter are visually intersecting the stone boundary walls. Adjust road end-points or wall placement so roads terminate cleanly before the walls.

title: Interview questions can only be selected on minimap, not main screen
Truck is spawned inside a building and is unusable
Move Depot building next to the Store
description: Reposition the Depot building in world.js so it is placed directly adjacent to the Store building.

title: Add building labels: Store and Hotel text on buildings
description: Render visible text labels on the Store building saying 'STORE' and on the Hotel building saying 'HOTEL' so players can identify them at a glance.

title: Add stone wall boundary to prevent leaving map
description: Players can currently walk outside the map into the void. Add a stone wall around the map perimeter to block movement out of bounds and prevent players from seeing into the void.

title: Add park features: slides, swings, sandbox
description: The park is currently just an empty area of green land. Add park objects and decorations such as slides, swings, and a sandbox to make it feel like an actual park.

title: Roads overlap houses, should run between them
description: Roads currently go through/overlap houses. They should be placed between houses so roads act as proper streets separating buildings.
